q: What is the right age for admission?
a: Children can be admitted from 2.5 to 6 years (age criteria may vary according to the academic session).
A play-based, activity-oriented, child-centric curriculum inspired by international best practices, focusing on holistic development through exploration, creativity, and hands-on learning.
9:30 AM to 2:00 PM, Monday to Saturday. Please contact the school office for the latest schedule.

q: How do I apply for admission?
a: Visit our campus, fill out the admission form, submit the required documents, and complete the admission formalities.

q: Which documents are required for admission?
a: Child's Birth Certificate, 6 passport-size photos of the child, 2 passport-size photos of each parent, child's Aadhaar Card, Parent/Guardian ID proof, Address proof, and Vaccination Record (if available).
Yes, safe transportation may be available on selected routes. Please contact the admissions office for details.
We maintain a low teacher-to-child ratio so every child receives individual attention and care.

q: Is your school safe for young children?
a: Absolutely. We have secure entry and exit, CCTV surveillance, trained staff, child-friendly classrooms, and safe indoor and outdoor play areas.
Homework is minimal and consists of fun activities that encourage family participation.

q: How do you communicate with parents?
a: Through Parent-Teacher Meetings, WhatsApp updates, phone calls, and progress reports.

q: What should my child bring to school?
a: School bag, water bottle, healthy snack/lunch, an extra pair of clothes if required, and any prescribed medication with instructions.

q: How do you help children settle into preschool?
a: Through orientation sessions, gradual settling-in, interactive activities, emotional support, and positive reinforcement.
Parents may send healthy snacks and lunch. Any meal program, if available, will be communicated separately.

q: Can parents visit the school before admission?
a: Yes, we encourage parents to schedule a campus tour to explore our classrooms and meet our team.
